db:select.doc:name: Select available drivers
db:select.db:sql: SELECT d.user_id, d.license_number, d.availability_status, d.onboarding_status, d.average_rating, d.total_rides, d.cumulative_balance, d.created_at, d.updated_at, u.first_name, u.last_name, u.email, u.mobile FROM ridexpress.drivers d JOIN ridexpress.users u ON d.user_id = u.user_id WHERE d.availability_status = 'online' ORDER BY d.created_at DESC

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload map { id: $.user_id, firstName: $.first_name, lastName: $.last_name, email: $.email, mobile: $.mobile, licenseNumber: $.license_number, availabilityStatus: $.availability_status, onboardingStatus: $.onboarding_status, averageRating: $.average_rating, totalRides: $.total_rides, cumulativeBalance: $.cumulative_balance, createdAt: $.created_at, updatedAt: $.updated_at }

db:select.doc:name: Select driver by ID
db:select.db:sql: SELECT d.user_id, d.license_number, d.license_expiry, d.license_photo_url, d.insurance_doc_url, d.background_check_id, d.background_check_status, d.onboarding_status, d.availability_status, d.average_rating, d.total_rides, d.cumulative_balance, d.created_at, d.updated_at, u.first_name, u.last_name, u.email, u.mobile, u.user_name FROM ridexpress.drivers d JOIN ridexpress.users u ON d.user_id = u.user_id WHERE d.user_id = CAST(:id AS UUID)

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- { id: payload[0].user_id, userName: payload[0].user_name, firstName: payload[0].first_name, lastName: payload[0].last_name, email: payload[0].email, mobile: payload[0].mobile, licenseNumber: payload[0].license_number, licenseExpiry: payload[0].license_expiry, licensePhotoUrl: payload[0].license_photo_url, insuranceDocUrl: payload[0].insurance_doc_url, backgroundCheckId: payload[0].background_check_id, backgroundCheckStatus: payload[0].background_check_status, onboardingStatus: payload[0].onboarding_status, availabilityStatus: payload[0].availability_status, averageRating: payload[0].average_rating, totalRides: payload[0].total_rides, cumulativeBalance: payload[0].cumulative_balance, createdAt: payload[0].created_at, updatedAt: payload[0].updated_at }

db:insert.doc:name: Insert driver
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO ridexpress.drivers (user_id, license_number, license_expiry) VALUES (CAST(:userId AS UUID), :licenseNumber, CAST(:licenseExpiry AS DATE))

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- {message: "Driver record already exists or constraint violation"}

db:update.doc:name: Update driver by ID
db:update.db:sql: UPDATE ridexpress.drivers SET availability_status = COALESCE(:availabilityStatus, availability_status), onboarding_status = COALESCE(:onboardingStatus, onboarding_status), background_check_id = COALESCE(:backgroundCheckId, background_check_id), background_check_status = COALESCE(:backgroundCheckStatus, background_check_status), license_photo_url = COALESCE(:licensePhotoUrl, license_photo_url), insurance_doc_url = COALESCE(:insuranceDocUrl, insurance_doc_url), average_rating = COALESCE(:averageRating, average_rating), total_rides = COALESCE(:totalRides, total_rides), cumulative_balance = COALESCE(:cumulativeBalance, cumulative_balance), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE user_id = CAST(:id AS UUID)
db:update.db:input-parameters: #[{ id: attributes.uriParams.id, availabilityStatus: payload.availabilityStatus default null, onboardingStatus: payload.onboardingStatus default null, backgroundCheckId: payload.backgroundCheckId default null, backgroundCheckStatus: payload.backgroundCheckStatus default null, licensePhotoUrl: payload.licensePhotoUrl default null, insuranceDocUrl: payload.insuranceDocUrl default null, averageRating: payload.averageRating default null, totalRides: payload.totalRides default null, cumulativeBalance: payload.cumulativeBalance default null }]

db:insert.doc:name: Insert driver vehicle
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO ridexpress.vehicles (user_id, make, model, year, license_plate, insurance_policy, is_active) VALUES (CAST(:userId AS UUID), :make, :model, :year, :licensePlate, :insurancePolicy, :isActive)
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ userId: attributes.uriParams.id, make: payload.make, model: payload.model, year: payload.year, licensePlate: payload.licensePlate, insurancePolicy: payload.insurancePolicy, isActive: payload.isActive default false }]

db:insert.doc:name: Insert driver document
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO ridexpress.user_attachments (user_id, document_type, file_name, file_path) VALUES (CAST(:userId AS UUID), :documentType, :fileName, :filePath)

db:insert.doc:name: Insert driver banking
db:insert.db:sql: INSERT INTO ridexpress.driver_banking (user_id, bank_name, account_holder, routing_number, account_token) VALUES (CAST(:userId AS UUID), :bankName, :accountHolder, :routingNumber, :accountToken)
db:insert.db:input-parameters: #[{ userId: attributes.uriParams.id, bankName: payload.bankName, accountHolder: payload.accountHolder, routingNumber: payload.routingNumber, accountToken: payload.accountToken }]

logger.message: get:\drivers\payouts\pending:router - Getting drivers eligible for payout

db:select.doc:name: Select drivers with pending payouts
db:select.db:sql: SELECT d.user_id, d.cumulative_balance, d.average_rating, d.total_rides, u.first_name, u.last_name, u.email FROM ridexpress.drivers d JOIN ridexpress.users u ON d.user_id = u.user_id WHERE d.cumulative_balance >= 10.00 ORDER BY d.cumulative_balance DESC

ee:message.ee:set-payload: %dw 2.0 output application/json --- payload map { id: $.user_id, firstName: $.first_name, lastName: $.last_name, email: $.email, cumulativeBalance: $.cumulative_balance, averageRating: $.average_rating, totalRides: $.total_rides }
